title: [kimi-review] e61148d: [SEVERITY: high] The commit contains no code changes — the d
description:
Commit: e61148d32
Message: fix(coap): add bounds checking to CBOR status encoding

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] The commit contains no code changes — the diff is empty. The commit message claims to add bounds checking to CBOR status encoding, but no such fix is present. If this addresses a real overflow/out-of-bounds risk, the vulnerability remains unfixed while the history suggests otherwise. Either the changes were lost (e.g., committed with `--allow-empty` or a bad amend), or the diff was omitted — this should be verified and the actual fix re-applied.
